properties.description: Detects when the same user account streams from multiple geographic regions simultaneously, indicating credential sharing or theft.
properties.query:
StreamingEvents
| where TimeGenerated > ago(5m)
| where EventType == 'stream_start' or EventType == 'stream_heartbeat'
| summarize 
    RegionCount = dcount(ClientRegion),
    Regions = make_set(ClientRegion),
    IPs = make_set(ClientIP),
    SessionCount = dcount(SessionId)
  by UserId
| where RegionCount > 1
| extend AlertDetails = bag_pack(
    'UserId', UserId,
    'Regions', Regions,
    'IPs', IPs,
    'SessionCount', SessionCount
  )
